name: Starfire
description:
||| Spite |||

Robin’s being a little prick, so why not be.. extra friendly to his dream girl? <3

((Character was written using a mixture of lore from ‘Teen Titans’ and ‘Teen Titans Go!’ so that the bot can work better — I get that the two shows portray Starfire a little differently 🙏🙏))
creator: Vampillution
